title: Crypto's next frontier isn't crypto, it's financing AI and robotics, Framework's Anderson says
summary: Blockchain is becoming the financial layer for capital-intensive industries rather than just crypto-native speculation, Michael Anderson, the crypto venture firm's cofounder, said.

title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000, on track for a rare back-to-back quarterly loss
summary: The token is down nearly 7% on the week with the altcoins falling harder. Bitcoin and ether are both ending the second quarter in the red, a back-to-back losing first half that runs against the usual pattern.

title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
summary: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.

title: What Robinhood’s recent layoffs say about the current state of crypto investments
summary: Despite the trading platform’s restructuring and the wave of crypto companies making cuts, signaling a late bear market, Altcoin Pro’s Horst, Anderson and Zhuleku explain there’s no reason to panic.

title: Tether putting $23 billion gold stockpile to work with bullion-backed loans
summary: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.
